title: linagrostis polystachia
intro: Linagrostis polystachia, also known as Stipa polystachya, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in temperate and subtropical regions. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Linagrostis polystachia include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and cough. Linagrostis polystachia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, with the dried flowers and leaves being the most commonly used parts for medicinal purposes.
